message:
fix(fr-store): correct six data-structure edge cases and add libc dep

- SortedSet::insert: simplify zero-score canonicalization — the old code
  had a redundant double-comparison that could skip the BTreeMap remove/
  re-insert when canonical scores matched but raw bits differed. Now the
  method returns false (no new member) after relocating the score entry.
- SETRANGE: return existing string length when value is empty instead of
  proceeding with a zero-length overwrite that could create spurious keys.
- LREM: use count.unsigned_abs() instead of (-count) as u64 to avoid
  overflow on i64::MIN.
- SUNION: start from the largest set and extend, avoiding redundant
  iteration over the largest member set via BTreeSet::extend.
- ZADD changed-count: track canonical score changes rather than raw-insert
  boolean, so the returned "changed" count matches Redis semantics when
  a score is updated to the same canonical value.
- hll_rho: switch from leading_zeros to trailing_zeros to match the Redis
  HyperLogLog register calculation convention.
- Add libc 0.2.184 dependency to fr-store.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -261,6 +261,7 @@ version = "0.1.0"
 dependencies = [
  "fr-expire",
  "fr-persist",
+ "libc",
 ]
 
 [[package]]
@@ -365,9 +366,9 @@ checksum = "09edd9e8b54e49e587e4f6295a7d29c3ea94d469cb40ab8ca70b288248a81db2"
 
 [[package]]
 name = "libc"
-version = "0.2.182"
+version = "0.2.184"
 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
-checksum = "6800badb6cb2082ffd7b6a67e6125bb39f18782f793520caee8cb8846be06112"
+checksum = "48f5d2a454e16a5ea0f4ced81bd44e4cfc7bd3a507b61887c99fd3538b28e4af"
 
 [[package]]
 name = "linux-raw-sys"
